name: dep-audit
description: Ecosystem-detecting dependency-advisory nag — a single shared SessionStart hook that checks a repo's pinned dependencies (Hex/mix.lock, Rust/Cargo.toml under native/, npm/package.json or npm_ex/npm.lock) for known security advisories and surfaces a watermark-gated, non-blocking reminder. Never blocks a session; silent when clean, when tooling is absent, or when the last check is still fresh.
